creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can't see anything obviously wrong here.

Unfortunately, there are no logs going back to 21 December on beefy17.  I looked at mx1 and mlmmj and I see (other) messages from beefy17 going through fine.

I can't see any denied messages in mlmmj.operation.log on mlmmj.

Cc:ing bapt@, since he knows more about the archiver workflow.
